title: stellaster luteus
intro: Stellaster luteus, also known as Yellow Star or Buttercup, is a perennial plant in the Ranunculaceae family, native to Europe and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Stellaster luteus include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and support immune function. The plant is commonly prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, which can be used to treat minor wounds and skin issues.
